meta.title: LOOP asset trustlines — Loop
meta.description: Verified issuer accounts for USDLOOP, GBPLOOP, and EURLOOP Stellar stablecoins. Add a trustline from any Stellar wallet to receive cashback on Loop.

heading: LOOP asset trustlines
intro: Loop pays cashback in <bold>USDLOOP</bold>, <bold>GBPLOOP</bold>, and <bold>EURLOOP</bold> — Stellar stablecoins pinned 1:1 to your home currency. To receive on-chain payouts, add a trustline against the verified issuer account below from any Stellar wallet.
loadError: Couldn’t load the trustline list. Please refresh.
empty: Trustlines are being configured — check back soon.

why.heading: Why trustlines?
why.body: On Stellar, an account needs a trustline for every non-native asset it can hold. A trustline says: this account is willing to receive tokens issued by this specific issuer. Without one, an on-chain payout to a USDLOOP address would simply bounce.
why.safety: Using the issuer account from this page — rather than searching by asset code in your wallet — is the single most important safety step. Anyone can issue a token called “USDLOOP”; only the account below is the real Loop-operated issuer.

wallets.heading: Recommended wallets
wallets.freighterDesc: browser extension maintained by SDF. Adds trustlines via the Manage Assets screen.
wallets.lobstrDesc: mobile wallet with a built-in asset search. Paste the issuer account from above.

pinned.USDLOOP: 1 USDLOOP = 1 US dollar cashback, backed 1:1 by Loop fiat reserves.
pinned.GBPLOOP: 1 GBPLOOP = 1 British pound cashback, backed 1:1 by Loop fiat reserves.
pinned.EURLOOP: 1 EURLOOP = 1 Euro cashback, backed 1:1 by Loop fiat reserves.
